title: Non-record: 11L Rank-2 Random-Adapter — sub-1 MB submission, val_bpb 2.13131 (3-seed mean)
author: IshanG97

data.description: Replaces every nn.Linear with a random base matrix regenerated from a seed plus a trainable low-rank adapter UV^T.

novel_contributions: Learning adapters on random linear maps using a seed-regenerated random base plus low-rank trainable correction
Sub-1 MB submission artifact with int8+zlib compression
11-layer rank-2 random-adapter model achieving 2.13131 val_bpb on a 3-seed mean
Demonstration that deeper 11L rank-2 outperforms prior 9L rank-8 reference at smaller artifact size
